repos.description: Configuration for package repositories that Spack searches for packages

items.description: Path to a Spack package repository directory

oneOf.description: Legacy format: list of local paths to package repository directories
Named repositories mapping configuration names to repository definitions
Path to a local Spack package repository directory containing repo.yaml and packages/

git.description: Git repository URL for remote package repository

branch.description: Git branch name to checkout (default branch if not specified)

commit.description: Specific git commit hash to pin the repository to

tag.description: Git tag name to pin the repository to

destination.description: Custom local directory path where the Git repository should be cloned

paths.description: List of relative paths (from the Git repository root) that contain Spack package repositories (overrides spack-repo-index.yaml)
